chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–1024 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of Case For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.08.2024 Petitioner No.1 Ali Tahir Advocate present in person. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr. Saifullah, A.A.G. Sindh. Mr. Riaz Ahmed, Director (Law), ECP. Mr. Abdullah Hanjirah, Deputy Director (Law), ECP..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel, in view of latest announcement of the hon’ble Supreme Court viz. PLD 2024 S.C. 256 (Hamza Rasheed Khan and another Vs. Election Appellate Tribunal Lahore High Court, Lahore and others), does not press this petition which is accordingly disposed of. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
